entries.gt_0053a7bd0bc2ed: Don't put the white stuff in the bucket.
entries.gt_0133ba74b7b99d: Don't stick your head in that passage!
entries.gt_0136fd1df5d956: If you see shadows, don't scream!
entries.gt_0158b35055593b: Latch back on, key out of the keyhole!
entries.gt_02cb689bbf9d89: Faster, while there's still a passage!
entries.gt_05c65fefaccee5: The walls are standing. That's a holiday.
entries.gt_06398c4dc2ff1c: The bread smells like cupboard. Guard it anyway.
entries.gt_06921ec3163acd: Lamp's buzzing lower than usual. Get out of the puddle.
entries.gt_06d908db65fcd6: The notebook smells of iodine. Good news doesn't smell like that.
entries.gt_0833d007876971: Let them think this place is empty.
entries.gt_0877f42110c186: Don't lick black soot off your palm. That's how they catch new ones.
entries.gt_0c5cb335041f56: Do not cut open the white slime.
entries.gt_0c5f86e7b2df3c: Take the key out of the keyhole!
entries.gt_0ca6bc04339f48: Glass on the floor. Don't run barefoot.
entries.gt_0d5ae6606579fd: So this is where I ended up.
entries.gt_0d7c11b7677684: The hermodoor gasket is wet and dirty. It holds, but not for long.
entries.gt_0dd0a6be412c50: The old newspaper is wet. It can't hold dates anymore.
entries.gt_0ddc4dfb79e7e8: The siren isn't screaming for nothing!
entries.gt_10377c05c52400: If I hear a rustle, I'll kill you all myself!
entries.gt_12992362c344f5: Hurts so much it's going dark...
entries.gt_12b558aa78b56a: Old woman dries a scarf by the pipe. Smells like outside.
entries.gt_12cb6d272102bb: Radio hisses numbers. Remember the first two.
entries.gt_13c3d18e359e3c: Neighbor's carrying an empty bucket. Means no news.
entries.gt_14533d7687449c: If they knock, don't open until the display says so!
entries.gt_150e8f02916e05: Whoever's at the door, hold it tighter!
entries.gt_16dab253c7a09a: If the shadow is ahead, stand in the light and don't play hero.
entries.gt_187a093f42721f: The photo curled by the radiator. Heat did it.
entries.gt_194d886b20959b: The peephole fogged up. Someone was breathing behind the door.
entries.gt_19bde6b02ae920: The cable's warm. Don't dry your coupon on it.
entries.gt_19e6d17c035f64: Take the water. Decide later if it's a sign or just water.
entries.gt_1a9f08aedb22a8: Move, unless you're completely done living!
entries.gt_1acdf32c4ee5e8: Pick up your feet and move!
entries.gt_1c7974f621b30a: Old folks argue about the courtyard. Kids count exits.
entries.gt_1cfbaf3f71d261: The siren doesn't scream for nothing!
entries.gt_1d0984627360f5: Lamp blinked three times. Count doors from here.
entries.gt_1d6b1e5fdd0d7b: Sit along the wall and shut up!
entries.gt_1d6dbd2fecafd6: The safe is open and empty. Its meanest state.
entries.gt_1eee1f29604f17: Fresh bucket ring on the floor. No water left.
entries.gt_205475827a79c2: The shift was wet. Wet filters got stacked for write-off.
entries.gt_20d73a2d5b4b9f: Old man hides a metro ticket. Don't ask where to.
entries.gt_213c457025ca8a: My gut says this is the end!
entries.gt_22a804a6b83903: Can't go into the corridor now...
entries.gt_230578f12baa8d: A little cult stays little until it seals a section.
entries.gt_237b31c8b97cbb: Move, while the walls still hold!
entries.gt_24b7d036639af9: The watchwoman hides the stamp in the kettle. Don't drink the tea.
entries.gt_24dae10c374c96: Water's yellow. Let it settle, if we live.
entries.gt_2641bbfdd8a412: All quiet for now, that's something.
entries.gt_26a2b08bce898f: Boots in white dust. It's not flour.
entries.gt_28ae632ec92b8a: Bread to the children first, then whoever shakes harder.
entries.gt_28f6a9a123bfac: At least the walls are in place.
entries.gt_29a8fb37f56d64: The orderly went for water, not an extra bandage.
entries.gt_29b1d5d95b8be0: We won't put it down here!
entries.gt_29ccba86db7556: Don't stand by the wall, fog runs low!
entries.gt_2aad9b545a4704: They got you in the corridor.
entries.gt_2b0c9b4bdaf568: Only the dead skip the queue. Everyone else breathes quieter.
entries.gt_2b0dc8fbf639dc: At least this corner is still whole.
entries.gt_2ce6e667f3864d: Kettle's heating with no water. Someone forgot the stove.
entries.gt_2de917b4b2b957: Neighbor coughs into a pillow. Pillow's no doctor.
entries.gt_2f69ba455a9783: A letter with no address lies dry. Means they kept it safe.
entries.gt_32319640f3136b: After all-clear there's a spot by the radiator. Don't ask whose yet.
entries.gt_323fef2cd865eb: Wet under the radiator. Means we'll need the bucket soon.
entries.gt_32a480f2b4bad9: Faucet hisses air. Don't set the bucket down yet.
entries.gt_32be69b2f8c6df: Corridor's dead already, don't look there!
entries.gt_32c7e645739638: Don't stand there like a post!
entries.gt_351dcdbbde376b: The loop hangs on the route, not your neck. Watch your step.
entries.gt_352553a4eeab55: Tea would be nice, but post comes first.
entries.gt_362cb3aa91e351: Wait it out and don't twitch!
entries.gt_366e6992ae7265: Queue at the radiator. Heat is by coupon today.
entries.gt_36fed5e0977e62: Three mugs on the table. Two came back.
entries.gt_38e3da5723d434: Queue isn't a fight while I'm watching.
entries.gt_398d34ceab5bed: Door's swollen at the bottom. The threshold is pulling water again.
entries.gt_39df8730b7bdbc: Draft carries flour. Kitchen's somewhere close.
entries.gt_3a93a42fc5a802: The whole route dragged me here.
entries.gt_3d45c9b6724c66: At least the walls haven't crawled.
entries.gt_3e0b69cbe6dca4: Canister rings empty. Means it's too late for the riser.
entries.gt_3e15aaee596190: If they don't answer, we don't wait.
entries.gt_3e7121cea67204: Every sound's like a shot now!
